title: MCP server tool layer has 0% test coverage
evidence: coverage report: brazilian_soccer/server.py 53/53 stmts missed (0%); tests/test_data.py imports SoccerData directly and never exercises the @mcp.tool() wrappers or _df_to_records
suggestion: Add tests that call the registered MCP tools (find_matches, head_to_head, team_stats, standings, biggest_wins, average_goals, search_players) to verify the server-facing JSON contract

title: Low overall test coverage (27%)
evidence: coverage report TOTAL 27% (data.py 27%, server.py 0%); test_coverage=0.27 in scores.json
suggestion: Cover untested branches in data.py (date parsing fallbacks, competition/season filters, alias map, home/away-only stats) to raise confidence in the query layer

title: Match query supports season but not an explicit date range
evidence: brazilian_soccer/data.py:217 find_matches accepts season but has no from/to date arguments; R4 is satisfied via the 'and/or season' clause but date-range filtering is absent
suggestion: Add optional start/end date parameters to find_matches and surface them on the MCP tool

title: Code-quality score below ceiling
suggestion: Review lint output for the data/query module to lift the quality score
